html:
Exclusive to:

“Used to add 5 days of durability on an item that can be sewn. Can also plug a leak on a boat.”

-

The Trusty Tape is a Character-specific Item craftable only by Winona through the Tools Filter, Clothing Filter and Survivor Items Filter using three Cut Grass and one Silk. Winona also starts the game with three Trusty Tapes in her inventory.

It can be used to repair degraded clothing, similar to the Sewing Kit, repairing 5 days of degradation on the item on which it is used. Trusty Tape can also be used to repair Boat Leaks. It is required to craft Winona's Spotlight, Catapult, Generator, and G.E.M.erator.

Eligible Items

The Trusty Tape may be used to repair the following items:

Name Durability Repaired
Rabbit Earmuffs 100%
Beefalo Hat 50%
Feather Hat 62.5%
Winter Hat 50%
Tam o' Shanter 20%
Top Hat 62.5%
Dapper Vest 50%
Breezy Vest 33.3%
Puffy Vest 33.3%
Belt of Hunger 63%
Hibearnation Vest 71%
Umbrella 83%
Eyebrella 55.5%
Rain Hat 50%
Rain Coat 50%
Cat Cap 50%
Summer Frest 62.5%
Straw Hat 100%
Desert Goggles 50%
Thermal Stone 100%
Bernie 100%
Pinetree Pioneer Hat 50%
Astroggles 100%
Chirpy Scarf 100%
Chirpy Cloak 100%
Chirpy Capelet 100%

Tips

  • The Trusty Tape is a safer and much more affordable way to repair items, and should always be prioritized over other options:
    • Five pieces of Trusty Tape can fix the the same amount of items as a Sewing Kit, while using only 5 Silk instead of 8. Unlike 2 Hound's Teeth, 15 Grass can be gathered faster, easier and without putting the player in danger.
    • When planning for Boat sailing, Trusty Tapes are a good option alongside Boat Patches depending on which resource the player has more of: Trusty Tapes require Grass and Silk, while Boat Patches require Logs and Stingers, either of which may be more difficult to get depending on the world generation.

Trivia

  • After Winona's introduction, the Trusty Tape used to be found in the Dress Tab. This was changed in the Winona Character Update.

Gallery

  • The appearance of Trusty Tape dropped on the ground.
  • Boat Leak repaired with a Trusty Tape.

–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Băng Trusty là một Vật phẩm dành riêng cho Nhân vật chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Winona thông qua Bộ lọc Công cụ, Bộ lọc Quần áo và Bộ lọc Vật phẩm Sống sót bằng cách sử dụng ba Cỏ Cắt và một Tơ. Winona cũng bắt đầu trò chơi với ba Băng Trusty trong hành trang của mình.

The '''Trusty Tape''' is a [[Character]]-specific [[Item]] craftable only by [[Winona]] through the [[Tools Filter]], [[Clothing Filter]] and [[Survivor Items Filter]] using three [[Cut Grass]] and one [[Silk]]. Winona also starts the game with three Trusty Tapes in her inventory.

It can be used to repair degraded clothing, similar to the [[Sewing Kit]], repairing 5 days of degradation on the item on which it is used. Trusty Tape can also be used to repair [[Boat Kit|Boat]] Leaks. It is required to craft [[Winona's Spotlight]], [[Winona's Catapult|Catapult]], [[Winona's Generator|Generator]], and [[Winona's G.E.M.erator|G.E.M.erator]].

== {{pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* The Trusty Tape is a safer and much more affordable way to repair items, and should always be prioritized over other options: 
** Five pieces of Trusty Tape can fix the the same amount of items as a Sewing Kit, while using only 5 Silk instead of 8. Unlike 2 [[Hound's Tooth|Hound's Teeth]], 15 Grass can be gathered faster, easier and without putting the player in danger.
** When planning for [[Boat]] sailing, Trusty Tapes are a good option alongside [[Boat Patch|Boat Patches]] depending on which resource the player has more of: Trusty Tapes require Grass and Silk, while Boat Patches require Logs and Stingers, either of which may be more difficult to get depending on the world generation.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* After Winona's introduction, the Trusty Tape used to be found in the [[Dress Tab]]. This was changed in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#March 7th, 2019 - Winona Character Update|Winona Character Update]].
